title: Elemental
description: Long before we were guided by zodiacs or TikToks, we were lead by something much older... Who better to teach us the old ways than a Drag Queen? With the power of singing, dancing and foolishness... Local Diva Alex Fincher guides you through an immersive journey exploring the 4 ancient Elements; Fire, Water, Earth and Air, in a drag cabaret show like no other! With original music, dancers and special guest performers, you will be transported to a world between time and place, real and imagined, coherent and nonsensical. Supported by Marlborough Productions.

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex
